response: The Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT), founded in 1861, holds the top spot as the #1 ranked university worldwide. It enrolls approximately 11,500 students with a highly selective acceptance rate of 3.9% and annual tuition of $57,590. MIT boasts an impressive faculty of 1,069 members, a massive $24.6 billion endowment, and a legacy of excellence evidenced by 98 Nobel laureates affiliated with the institution.
